title: DEATHLOOP 4 YOU
description:
July 22nd, 22:00.

Hayato's life is taken by an unknown assailant.

Using his "Return by Death" ability to escape this fatal destiny, he hunts down the mysterious figure who keeps killing him.

And Hayato will come to learn...

...for whose sake this endless loop of death was created.

▼ Game FeaturesA story-driven, first-person horror game.

A mystery where you repeat a death loop to uncover the truth behind the incident and the enigmatic figure who relentlessly murders the protagonist.

Various trials and errors utilizing the death loop:

What happens if you run far away?

What happens if you hide in the wardrobe?

What happens if you get a gun and fight back?

What happens if you doubt your friends?

What happens if you kill everyone around the house?

Three endings + an alternate ending.

▼ PlaytimeApprox. 5-9 hours (depending on playstyle).

▼ Streaming and SNS Posting GuidelinesIndividuals and corporations alike may stream this game without prior permission.

Monetization is permitted only through the functions provided by the video streaming platform.

We would appreciate it if you include the game's title in your video or stream title, and include a link to the Steam page in the description.

Furthermore, we assume no responsibility for any damages incurred as a result of streaming this game.
description_short: A university student, Hayato Ichijo, is trapped. In an endless prison of death.
